ddls:
CREATE TABLE "theatres" (
  "theatre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theatre */,
  "theatre_name" TEXT /* Name of the theatre */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "theatre_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theatre type */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total seating capacity of the theatre */,
  "opening_date" TEXT /* Date the theatre opened */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the theatre */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the theatre */,
  "address" TEXT /* Full physical address of the theatre */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who manages the theatre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theatre_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theatres_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theatres_theatre_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("theatre_type_id") REFERENCES theatre_types ("theatre_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_theatres_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shows" (
  "show_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each show */,
  "theatre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the theatre where the show is being held */,
  "show_name" TEXT /* Name of the show */,
  "show_date" TEXT /* Date of the show */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the show */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the show */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the show */,
  "movie_rating" TEXT /* Rating of the movie (e.g., PG, R) */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language in which the movie is shown */,
  "subtitle_language" TEXT /* Language of the subtitles if available */,
  "show_type" TEXT /* Type of show (e.g., 2D, 3D, IMAX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("show_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shows_theatre_id FOREIGN KEY ("theatre_id") REFERENCES theatres ("theatre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "show_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "show_id" INTEGER /* ID of the show */,
  "gross_revenue" TEXT /* Gross revenue for the show */,
  "tickets_sold" INTEGER /* Number of tickets sold for the show */,
  "occupancy_rate" TEXT /* Occupancy rate for the show */,
  "show_count" INTEGER /* Number of shows held */,
  "refund_amount" TEXT /* Total amount refunded for the show */,
  "refund_count" INTEGER /* Number of tickets refunded */,
  "average_ticket_price" TEXT /* Average price of a ticket for the show */,
  "peak_attendance_time" TEXT /* Time of the day when the theatre had the highest attendance */,
  "marketing_campaign_id" INTEGER /* ID of the marketing campaign associated with the show */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_show_performance_marketing_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("marketing_campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_show_performance_show_id FOREIGN KEY ("show_id") REFERENCES shows ("show_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., theatre manager, analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "active_status" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of the access event */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "theatre_types" (
  "theatre_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each theatre type */,
  "theatre_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the theatre type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the theatre type */,
  "capacity_range" TEXT /* Range of seating capacities for the theatre type */,
  "features" TEXT /* Features available in the theatre type (e.g., reclining seats, 4K projection) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("theatre_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "province" TEXT /* Province of the location */,
  "postal_code" TEXT /* Postal code of the location */,
  "time_zone" TEXT /* Time zone of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "average_income" TEXT /* Average income of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "budget" TEXT /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "target_audience" TEXT /* Target audience for the campaign */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the campaign */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id")
)
